title: Make phone number on background image white

requirements.summary: Change the phone number text color to white in the Hero section so it matches the other white text displayed over the background image
acceptanceCriteria: The phone number displayed in the Hero section over the background image is rendered in white (#ffffff or equivalent).
The phone number remains clearly legible against the background image.
No other text colors in the Hero section are unintentionally altered.

file_operations.description: Update the phone number text styling to use white color (text-white or equivalent Tailwind class) to match the other text elements displayed over the background image in the Hero section. Ensure the phone number button or text element has consistent white styling with the headline and tagline.
